title: protium robustum
intro: Protium robustum, also known as the "Vetiver grass" or "Khas" in some regions, is a type of medicinal plant native to India and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, headache, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Protium robustum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Protium robustum include essential oils, teas, and infusions that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
